description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage using the alpine Docker image. Define variables PKGS set to make gcc musl-dev ocaml python3 py3-pip and USER set to gitlab. Add a job named test:alpine in the test stage that runs before_script commands: uname -a, apk add --no-cache $PKGS, and python3 -m pip install --user fs sh green pygments, then executes the script command python3 -m green. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
